Who We Are

Not Just a Middleman.
Not Just an Agency.

Hexaco Global is a global trade and business growth company built on a two-pillar model. We connect suppliers with international buyers while giving businesses the digital presence they need to compete globally.

"We don't just find buyers — we prepare businesses to attract and convert global buyers."

What We Do

Two Pillars.
One Pipeline.

Most companies do trade OR marketing. We control both ends of the deal.

01
Core Business
Trade Facilitation
End-to-end international trade management. We source buyers, coordinate suppliers, negotiate deals, and handle every step of the export process.
  • Import & Export facilitation
  • International buyer sourcing
  • Supplier coordination
  • Deal negotiation & closing
  • End-to-end export handling
02
Growth Services
Digital Growth
We build the digital presence that turns suppliers into globally discoverable businesses — attracting buyers before we even reach out.
  • Professional website development
  • SEO & web optimization
  • Social media marketing
  • Branding & identity design

1
